args.text: Severity assessment confirmed: CVE-2026-30117 is a high-severity session-fixation flaw in the token refresh path, affecting auth-api and session-store. Ticket TCK-9902 opened and in progress.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body: Patch plan confirmed: auth-api v5.8.1 -> v5.8.4, session-store v2.2.6 -> v2.2.9. Deploys proceeding per patch-plan.md.

args.text: Both services patched and confirmed: auth-api v5.8.4, session-store v2.2.9.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: Patching complete and verified: auth-api v5.8.4, session-store v2.2.9. See patch-verification.md.

args.text: Credential rotation checklist completed: refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of tonight's security maintenance (CVE-2026-30117 remediation), all sessions have been invalidated. Please sign in again.
